answer:
### Mourning Periods (Āśauca) for Sapiṇḍas in Manu, Yājñavalkya, and Viṣṇu

The three Smṛtis prescribe highly similar durations of ritual impurity (āśauca) following death, scaled by *varṇa* for *sapiṇḍas* (blood relatives up to the 7th degree). Contrary to the query's suggestion, Yājñavalkya does **not** prescribe uniformly shorter periods than Manu (they match exactly), nor does Viṣṇu deviate substantially (minor variations in phrasing and some extensions, e.g., for wives/slaves). All emphasize 10 days as baseline for Brāhmaṇas, with extensions for lower *varṇas*. Manu places this in Chapter 5 (verses 57–96, continuous with food/purity rules),[^1] Yājñavalkya in Chapter 3,[^2] and Viṣṇu in Chapter 22.[^3]

| Relative/Event                  | Manu (Ch. 5)                          | Yājñavalkya (Ch. 3)                   | Viṣṇu (Ch. 22)                        |
|---------------------------------|---------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|---------------------------------------|
| **Brāhmaṇa *sapiṇḍas***        | 10 days[^4]                          | 10 nights (or 3 nights)[^5]          | 10 days[^6]                          |
| **Kṣatriya (*rājanya*) *sapiṇḍas*** | 12 days (for "ruler")               | 12 days[^7]                          | 12 days[^8]                          |
| **Vaiśya *sapiṇḍas***          | 15 days                              | 15 days[^9]                          | 15 days[^10]                         |
| **Śūdra *sapiṇḍas***           | 1 month                              | 30 days (or half for righteous Śūdra)[^11] | 1 month[^12]                         |
| **Child <2 years/teeth**       | 3 days (bury, no fire/water rites)[^13] | Bury, no water rite; immediate for kin[^14] | Immediate (no cremation/water)[^15]  |
| **Miscarriage**                 | Nights = months of pregnancy[^16]    | Nights = months of pregnancy[^17]    | Days/nights = months[^18]            |
| **Teacher/guru**                | 3 nights[^19]                        | 1 day[^20]                           | 3 nights[^21]                        |
| **King (local)**                | Daylight only[^22]                   | 1 day[^23]                           | 1 day[^24]                           |
| **Exceptions (no āśauca)**     | Kings, vows, sacrifices, battle/death by king/lightning/cow-Brāhmaṇa protection[^25] | Kings, lightning, battle/cow-Brāhmaṇa, vows/sacrifices[^26] | Kings/vows/sacrifices/artisans/king's command, lightning/battle[^27] |

**Key Parallels & Notes**:
- **Core Structure**: All grade by *varṇa* (Br. shortest → Śū. longest), with *sapiṇḍa* limit at 7th degree. Shorter options (1–3 days/nights) for distant kin, children, or emergencies.
- **Daily Rules**: During āśauca: No study/sacrifice/gifts; sleep on ground, simple food (no salt/meat), bathe daily.[^28]
- **Purification**: Bathing, mantras (Gāyatrī, aghamṛṣaṇa), fasting, or *pañcagavya* for violations.[^29]
- **No Major Differences**: User may recall variant recensions; these translations align closely. Viṣṇu adds details for inter-*varṇa* eating during another's āśauca (e.g., Br. eating Vaiśya's food: 3 nights fast).[^30]

The corpus lacks exhaustive variants, but these represent the primary prescriptions. For full contexts, see cited chapters.

[^1]: *Manusmṛti*, Ch. 5 [/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/05/translation/].
[^2]: *Yājñavalkya Smṛti*, Ch. 3 [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/].
[^3]: *Viṣṇu Smṛti*, Ch. 22 [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/].
[^4]: [/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/06/translation/#p-89d810].
[^5]: [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/#p-25b952].
[^6]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-2be678].
[^7]: [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/#p-452f9d].
[^8]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-3f2f65].
[^9]: Ibid.
[^10]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-f890e2].
[^11]: [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/#p-452f9d].
[^12]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-db3442].
[^13]: [/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/06/translation/#p-5e420f] (3 days, no rites).
[^14]: [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/#p-40328e].
[^15]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-5b5c6e].
[^16]: [/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/06/translation/#p-01ada6].
[^17]: [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/#p-0fc9a5].
[^18]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-97d33a].
[^19]: [/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/06/translation/#p-89d810].
[^20]: [/works/unknown-yajnavalkya-smrti-cb88d6/03/translation/#p-0b5358].
[^21]: [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-c1f6af].
[^22]: [/works/unknown-manusmrti-347b76/06/translation/#p-5e420f].

[^29]: E.g., Viṣṇu [/works/unknown-visnu-smrti-27f0d8/22/translation/#p-434207].
